vulnerabilities.evidence:
User-Agent: *
Disallow:/my/
Disallow:/order/
Disallow:/repay/
Disallow:/user/

vulnerabilities.remediation: 删除或限制访问敏感文件
vulnerabilities.verify_method: 确认文件存在且包含敏感内容

vulnerabilities.description: 页面缺少 Clickjacking 防护
vulnerabilities.evidence: 未设置 X-Frame-Options 或 CSP frame-ancestors
vulnerabilities.remediation: 添加 X-Frame-Options: DENY 或 CSP frame-ancestors 指令

vulnerabilities.description: 缺少安全响应头: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Strict-Transport-Security, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy
vulnerabilities.evidence: 缺失: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Strict-Transport-Security, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy
vulnerabilities.verify_method: 确认缺少安全头: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Strict-Transport-Security, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy
